meta.name: DRYscope Tax Model
meta.note: Tax applies to the MATERIAL portion only; labor is never taxed. Per line: qty x material_per_unit x (rate/100). Rates below are jurisdiction-level approximations for fast selection. Where a ZIP spans more than one jurisdiction, confirm the exact rooftop rate at lookup_url.
meta.authoritative_source: Colorado Department of Revenue — Jurisdiction Codes & Rates spreadsheet (republished twice yearly, Jan & Jul)
meta.review_cycle: Re-download the CO DOR rate file each January and July; reconcile rates and re-publish.
meta.status: SEED — rates carried over from the app's prior RATES list and web research. NOT yet reconciled against the DOR source_file. Replace with authoritative values + build zip_candidates from that file.
meta.transfer_note: State-agnostic schema. For another state: set meta.state/sourcing/lookup_url, replace jurisdictions[] from that state's free rate source, and rebuild zip_candidates.

jurisdictions.name: Parker (Town limits)
jurisdictions.note: Inside incorporated Town of Parker AND within RTD. A small number of Parker addresses outside RTD run ~7.0%.

jurisdictions.name: Unincorporated Douglas County
jurisdictions.note: No town tax. Covers Stonegate and much of Highlands Ranch. Parcels outside RTD run ~4.0%.

jurisdictions.name: Highlands Ranch (unincorporated)
jurisdictions.note: Unincorporated Douglas. ~5.0% inside RTD, ~4.0% outside; certain retail centers add a PIF at the register. Confirm by address.

jurisdictions.name: Lone Tree
jurisdictions.note: Home-rule city. Some Lone Tree zones carry additional improvement-district fees.

jurisdictions.name: Castle Rock
jurisdictions.note: Home-rule city. NOT in RTD/SCFD. Confirm component split against DOR file.

jurisdictions.name: Castle Pines
jurisdictions.note: Home-rule city. Confirm RTD/SCFD inclusion and split against DOR file.

jurisdictions.name: Centennial
jurisdictions.note: Arapahoe County. Confirm split against DOR file.

jurisdictions.name: Greenwood Village
jurisdictions.note: Arapahoe County home-rule city. Confirm split against DOR file.

jurisdictions.name: Littleton
jurisdictions.note: Spans Arapahoe, Douglas, and Jefferson counties — county portion varies by parcel. Confirm by address.

jurisdictions.name: Englewood
jurisdictions.note: Arapahoe County home-rule city. Confirm split against DOR file.

jurisdictions.name: Aurora
jurisdictions.note: Home-rule city spanning Arapahoe, Adams, and Douglas counties — county portion varies. North-Parker service area. Confirm by address.

jurisdictions.name: Denver
jurisdictions.note: Consolidated city-county, home-rule. Confirm split against DOR file.

zip_candidates._note: Maps a service-area ZIP to the jurisdiction ids that occur within it, so the picker can show ONLY that ZIP's real options. SKELETON — verify/complete from the DOR file + GIS locator. A single ZIP commonly spans 2+ jurisdictions.
